skills.name: Ninja Dodge
skills.description: Whenever you 'dodge', throw !2!/{3} 'Shurikens'

skills.name: Shuriken Throw Lv. 2
skills.description: Every !2! rounds, throw !2!/{3} 'Shurikens'.

skills.name: Deadly Stars Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Shuriken DMG' !+125%!, but 'Shurikens' no longer trigger other effects.

skills.name: Silver Shurikens
skills.description: Whenever a 'Shuriken' is thrown, gain !3! 'Shop Tokens'

skills.name: Enhanced Combo
skills.description: Every 'Combo Attack' increases 'Crit Rate' by !+2%!/{+3%}, stacking up to !15! times.

skills.name: Combo Mastery Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Combo Rate' !+30%!/{+45%}, gain 'ATK' !+10%!/{+15%} on every 'Combo Attack', lasts until end of battle.

skills.name: Follow-up Strike
skills.description: Every !4!/{3} 'Basic Attacks' or 'Combo Attacks', deliver an additional 'Combo Attack' that is guaranteed to 'critically strike'.

skills.name: Slow And Steady Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Status Effects DMG' !+40%!/{+60%}

skills.name: Affliction Affection Lv. 2
skills.description: Deal !4%!/{8%} more damage for each unique 'Status Effect' on the enemy

skills.name: Enhanced Counter
skills.description: Every 'Counter Attack' increases 'Damage Reduction' by !+2%!/{+3%}, stacking up to !15! times.

skills.name: Counter Rate Up Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Counter Rate' !+15%!/{+30%}

skills.name: Counter Mastery Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Counter Rate' !+30%!/{+45%}, gain 'DEF' !+10%! on every 'Counter Attack', lasts until end of battle.

skills.name: Riposte
skills.description: Every !4! turns, the next time you are attacked you will receive !-50%! less damage and then you deliver a 'Counter Attack' that deals 'double damage'.

skills.name: Combo Bolt
skills.description: After every 'Combo Attack', cast !1!/{2} 'Bolt'

skills.name: Lightning Weapon Lv. 2
skills.description: Your 'Weapon Attacks' deal additional 'lightning damage' and have a !75%!/{100%} chance to cast 'Bolt'.

skills.name: Energizing Current Lv. 2
skills.description: Every 'Bolt' grants you !4!/{6} 'Ultimate Charge'

skills.name: Overload
skills.description: Every 'Bolt' increases your 'Combo Rate' by !+10%!, stacking up to !10! times, but every 'Combo Attack' removes !2! stacks.

skills.name: Flash Frost
skills.description: Every !2!/{1} turn, cast 'Icicle'. If you have a 'shield' active, cast 'Icicle' again.

skills.name: Ice Weapon Lv. 2
skills.description: Your 'Weapon Attacks' deal additional 'ice damage' and have a !75%!/{100%} chance to cast 'Icicle'.

skills.name: Ice Spikes Lv. 2
skills.description:
When you are 'attacked' while having a 'Shield' up, 'counter-attack' with !1!/{2} 'Icicle'.
Start combat with a shield equal to !15%! of 'Max HP'.

skills.name: Deadly Ice
skills.description: Every time 'Icicle' critically strikes, cast !1!/{2} 'Frost Strike'

skills.name: Ultimate Flame Strike
skills.description: After using your 'Ultimate', cast !1!/{2} 'Flame Strike'

skills.name: Fire Weapon Lv. 2
skills.description: Your 'Weapon Attacks' deal additional 'fire damage' and have a !60%!/{80%} to cast 'Fireball'.

skills.name: Flame Strike Lv. 2
skills.description: After casting 'Fireball', you have a !70%! chance to cast 'Flame Strike'

skills.name: Blazing Frenzy
skills.description: Everytime you apply a stack of 'Burn', gain !1! stack of 'Blazing Frenzy', increasing your 'Fire DMG' by !+5%!, stacking up to !20! times.

skills.name: Antidote
skills.description: Damage taken from 'Damage over Time' effects is reduced by !50%!/{75%}

skills.name: Hardened Lv. 2
skills.description: 'DMG Reduction' !+15%!/{+30%}

skills.name: Gigantify
skills.description: At the 'start of combat' and after every !4! turns, gain 'Gigantify', increasing your 'Max HP' and 'Current HP' by !+100%! for !1! turn

skills.name: Elemental Focus
skills.description: Dealing 'Fire'/'Ice'/'Lightning' damage increases your damage dealt of that element type by !+15%!, stacking up to !5! times. Dealing damage with a different element resets all your stacks.

skills.name: Pet Trainer
skills.description: You can ?no longer use Weapon Attacks?, but your 'Pets' attack delay are reduced by !1! and they deal !+50%! increased damage.

skills.name: Deep Cuts
skills.description: Whenever your 'Weapon Attack' critically strikes, apply !2!/{3} stacks of 'Wound'

skills.name: Wound Strike Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Weapon Attacks' will apply !2!/{3} stacks of 'Wound'.

skills.name: Cleave Mastery Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Cleave DMG' !+130%!/{+160%}, but ?no longer? applies 'Wound'.

skills.name: Burning Rage
skills.description: You can no longer gain 'Ultimate Charge', but all your 'Cleaves' are replaced with 'Steel Cyclone'

skills.name: Toxic Retaliation
skills.description: Whenever you 'take damage' or use a 'Counter Attack', apply !1!/{2} stack of 'Poison' on the enemy

skills.name: Poison Strike Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Weapon Attacks' will apply !2!/{3} stacks of 'Poison'.

skills.name: Outbreak Lv. 2
skills.description: At round !3!, apply 'Poison' !10!/{15} times on all enemies.

skills.name: Venom Burst
skills.description: Every !20! times you apply 'Poison', use 'Venom Burst', dealing damage equal to !10%! 'Max HP' to all enemies.

skills.name: Steady Growth
skills.description: Every turn, your 'Current HP' and 'Max HP' increase by !+3%!/{+5%}, stacking infinitely.

skills.name: Recovery Lv. 2
skills.description: You have a !50%!/{80%} chance to restore '5% HP' every turn.

skills.name: Lifesteal Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Weapon Attacks' have a !60%!/{80%} chance to 'Lifesteal'

skills.name: Feast
skills.description: Whenever you defeat an enemy, your 'Max HP' is increased by !+2%! for the rest of the current run.

skills.name: Corrosion
skills.description: Deal !+1%!/{+2%} increased damage to enemies for each stack of 'Poison' on them

skills.name: Poison Cloud Lv. 2
skills.description: At the end of your turn, apply !2!/{3} stacks of 'Poison' to all enemies.

skills.name: Serpent Stance
skills.description: Dealing any form of non-poison damage will apply !1! stack of 'Poison' on the enemy

skills.name: Enraged Durability
skills.description: When 'HP' !<40%!, 'DMG Reduction' !+30%!/{+50%}

skills.name: Darkside Lv. 2
skills.description: When !HP >50%!, 'ATK' !+75%!/{+100%} but drain ?10%? of your 'HP' every turn.

skills.name: Purity
skills.description: When 'HP' !<40%! for the first time, remove all damage over time and crowd control effects from yourself.

skills.name: Frostbite
skills.description: Your 'critical hit rate' is increased by !+5%! for each stack of 'Chill' on the enemy

skills.name: Fragile Cold Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Chill' increases damage you deal to the target by !8%!/{10%} per stack.

skills.name: Freezing Cold Lv. 2
skills.description:
When an enemy reaches max 'Chill' stacks, they become 'Frozen', and all 'Chill' stacks are consumed.
Deal !20%!/{30%} increased damage to 'Frozen' enemies.

skills.name: Evercold
skills.description: At the end of your turn, and whenever you cast your 'Ultimate', and whenever 'Icicle' critically strikes, your 'Ice DMG' is increased by !+10%!, stacking up to !15! times.

skills.name: Panic Shield
skills.description: After taking damage for the first time, gain a 'shield' equal to !25%! of your 'Missing HP'

skills.name: Strike Shield Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Weapon Attacks' have a !50%!/{75%} to grant a 'Shield'

skills.name: Exoplating Lv. 2
skills.description: At the start of combat, gain a 'Shield' equal to !70%!/{100%} of your Max HP, but 'Max HP' !-40%!

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description: At the end of your turn, if you have any amount of 'shield', use 'Shield Bash', dealing damage equal to the amount of 'shield' you have.

skills.name: Electroparalysis
skills.description: Dealing 'Lightning DMG' lowers enemy 'dodge rate', 'combo rate', and 'counter rate' by !-5%! for !2! turns, stacking up to !5! times.

skills.name: Live Wire Lv. 2
skills.description: When attacked by an enemy, cast !1-2!/{2-3} 'Bolts'.

skills.name: High Voltage Lv. 2
skills.description: Each 'Bolt' increases your 'Lightning DMG' by !+12%!/{+15%} for !2! turns.

skills.name: Static Discharge
skills.description: Every !15! Bolts, cast 'Static Discharge', dealing 'Lightning DMG' to all enemies and 'stunning' them for !1! turn.

skills.name: A Warm Welcome
skills.description: At the start of combat, cast 'Fire Wave' !3!/{5} times

skills.name: Pyromania Lv. 2
skills.description: Deal !25%!/{40%} more damage to 'burning' targets.

skills.name: Firestarter Lv. 2
skills.description: After casting 'Fireball', you have a !75%! chance to cast 'Fire Wave' !2!/{3} times.

skills.name: Fire Lord
skills.description: Dealing 'Fire DMG' restores a bit of 'HP', and heals twice as much when 'HP' !<40%!. 'Fire DMG'

skills.name: Critical Energy
skills.description: Everytime you land a 'critical hit', gain !+5!/{+8} 'Ultimate Charge'.

skills.name: Critical Hit Rate Up Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Critical Hit Rate' !+15%!/{+25%}

skills.name: Desperate Cleave
skills.description: At the end of your turn, if you are below !<40%! 'HP', use !1!/{2} 'Cleave'

skills.name: Opportunist Lv. 2
skills.description: Deal !+25%!/{+50%} 'increased DMG' to enemies afflicted with 'Wound'.

skills.name: Licking Wounds Lv. 2
skills.description: After defeating an enemy, restore !3%!/{5%} of your 'HP'. Effectiveness increases for 'each stack' of 'Wound' the enemy had.

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.description: After applying 'Wound' !10! times, fully fill your 'Ultimate Bar'

skills.name: Critical Throw
skills.description: Whenever your 'Weapon Attacks' critically strike, throw !1!/{2} 'Shurikens'

skills.name: Energizing Shuriken Lv. 2
skills.description: Every !2! rounds, throw !1! 'Shuriken'. All 'Shurikens' have a chance to grant !+8! 'Ultimate Charge'. {'Chance' increased}

skills.name: Fuma Shuriken Lv. 2
skills.description: Every !3! 'Shurikens' thrown /{ and at the start of every turn}, throw a massive 'Fuma Shuriken'.

skills.name: Thousand Cuts
skills.description: After dealing damage with a 'Shuriken', there is a !50%! chance to apply 'Thousand Cuts', dealing damage every turn equal to !2%!  of the enemy's Max HP for !2! turns.

skills.name: Skilled Fighter
skills.description: 'Skill DMG' !+80%!, 'Combo Rate' ?-60%?, 'Counter Rate' ?-60%?

skills.name: Weapon Mastery
skills.description: Your 'Basic Attacks', 'Combo Attacks' and 'Counter Attacks' deal !+80%! more DMG

skills.name: Vampiric
skills.description: 'Lifesteal Rate' !+25%!, 'Lifesteal Effect' !+50%!, 'Magic DMG' ?-50%?

skills.name: Warrior Lv. 2
skills.description: 'Physical DMG' !+30%!/{+50%}, 'Weapon Attack DMG' !+30%!/{+50%}, 'Magical DMG' ?-30%?/?-50%?
